redundancies.issue: `.container` is defined twice with different max-width values (1280px vs 1320px)
current_css: Line 121: .container { width: 100%; max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 22px; }
Line 151: .container { width: 100%; max-width: 1320px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 16px; }
redundancies.recommendation: REMOVE - Keep only one definition at line 151 (header-specific). Add context comments if needed.

redundancies.issue: Repeated `-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur()` paired with `backdrop-filter: blur()`. Modern browsers support the unprefixed version.
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP as is - These maintain compatibility with older Safari versions (iOS 9-14)

redundancies.issue: Duplicate webkit scrollbar hiding rules across multiple media queries and sections
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - These are targeting different elements and should remain

redundancies.issue: Duplicate media query styling for `.container` at 767px breakpoint
redundancies.recommendation: REMOVE SECOND instance at line 2264 - consolidate into first instance

redundancies.issue: Complete duplicate definition of skin-product card styles with conflicting values. Old version (lines 3189-3250) is superseded by newer version (3360-3520)
redundancies.recommendation: REMOVE lines 3189-3250 entirely - keep only the newer, more complete version at lines 3360-3520

redundancies.issue: Third definition of `.container` with max-width: 1400px in skincare-product-showcase section
redundancies.recommendation: REMOVE - Use consistent .container definition from line 151

redundancies.issue: Multiple `-webkit-` prefix lines for text clamping. While needed for WebKit, the unprefixed `display: box` support varies.
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - These maintain compatibility with mobile browsers and older Chrome versions

redundancies.issue: Both `mask-image` and `-webkit-mask-image` are defined with identical gradients in partner section
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Both are needed for browser compatibility (Firefox needs unprefixed, older Safari needs -webkit-)

redundancies.issue: Pseudo-element defined but may conflict with overlay styling
redundancies.recommendation: REVIEW - Verify this overlay is necessary and doesn't conflict with hover states

redundancies.issue: Text-clamping setup duplicated across multiple elements with same values
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP individual - Each element needs specific styling

redundancies.issue: Additional media query overrides for .skin-product-card that may conflict with line 3189 definitions
redundancies.recommendation: REVIEW & CONSOLIDATE - After removing lines 3189-3250, review these media queries
CONSOLIDATE - Use #9aa7a2 (newer, more consistent with design system)

redundancies.issue: Divider styling for topbar links that appears to be unused in HTML
redundancies.verification: Not found in Home.html topbar structure
redundancies.recommendation: REVIEW - Check if this is still used in other pages before removing

redundancies.issue: Some @keyframes animations may not be used if their target elements are hidden
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - These are actively used in hero section

redundancies.issue: font-size: 10px may be too small for text content, potential usability issue
redundancies.recommendation: REVIEW for accessibility - may need adjustment to 12px

redundancies.issue: Footer styling appears well-organized but uses multiple custom classes instead of BEM methodology
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Functional but could be refactored for future maintenance

redundancies.issue: Multiple @media queries for 1199px breakpoint scattered throughout file
redundancies.recommendation: CONSOLIDATE - Group all 1199px media queries into single location for better maintainability

redundancies.issue: Hover transform applied but may not be noticeable at actual screen sizes
redundancies.recommendation: REVIEW - Consider if scale(1.04) is visible enough

redundancies.issue: Class `.skin-solution-stock` used in Home.html line 490 but is defined in skin-solution section
redundancies.issue_detail: This is using .skin-solution-* class in .skin-product-card section
redundancies.recommendation: RENAME - Should use .skin-product-stock instead. This causes maintenance confusion.

redundancies.issue: Text-clamping properties repeated in slightly different form across old and new product card styles
redundancies.recommendation: CONSIDER REFACTORING - Create reusable .text-clamp-2 utility class

redundancies.issue: 42 different .kf-* classes defined - excessive for footer styling
redundancies.recommendation: REVIEW - Consider reducing to core classes only

redundancies.issue: These styles in old section (lines 3202-3250) are less complete than newer versions
redundancies.recommendation: REMOVE - Replaced by better implementations in lines 3360+

redundancies.issue: grid-auto-flow: column with grid-auto-columns calculations - potential browser layout issues
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Layout works but document reasoning in comments

redundancies.issue: Multiple transitions defined on same property (transform, opacity, filter)
redundancies.current_css: transition: transform 0.35s ease, opacity 0.35s ease, filter 0.35s ease;
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Smooth animation but could be optimized with will-change

redundancies.type: DUPLICATE CLASS NAMING IN OLD SECTION
redundancies.issue: Classes defined differently in lines 3150-3250 vs their later versions
redundancies.recommendation: REMOVE entire lines 3150-3250 block after verification

redundancies.issue: Both use identical text-clamping pattern but separately defined
redundancies.recommendation: CONSIDER - Extract to utility class in future refactor

redundancies.issue: Both .hero-3d-visual AND .hero-3d-wrap set to same min-height in same query
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Intentional for different layout aspects

redundancies.issue: transform: translateY(-8px) is subtle but similar to other elements (-4px, -2px, -3px)
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Intentional variation for visual hierarchy

redundancies.issue: Grid column changes at multiple breakpoints but could be simplified
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Necessary for responsive design

redundancies.issue: Similar media query structure to skin-solution section but different prefix
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Required for combo section styling

redundancies.issue: 400+ lines of .combo-premium-* CSS mirrors .skin-solution-* pattern exactly
redundancies.recommendation: REVIEW - Could use CSS variables or @extend to reduce duplication

redundancies.issue: Both leaf animations use transform rotate() with very similar values (only 2-3 degrees difference)
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Intentional visual variation

redundancies.issue: Multiple calc() values for grid columns lack documentation
redundancies.recommendation: COMMENT - Add explanations for why specific gap adjustments are needed

redundancies.issue: product-showcase-grid defined twice with slightly different column counts/gaps
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP second - Better implementation with minmax

redundancies.issue: Complex selector chain for simple text styling
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Functional but could be simplified

redundancies.type: DUPLICATE SCROLLBAR RULES IN MEDIA QUERY
redundancies.issue: scrollbar-width: none; AND ::-webkit-scrollbar both hiding scrollbars
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Both are needed for cross-browser compatibility

redundancies.issue: Media queries for old .skin-product definitions (lines 3524-3550) that should be removed
redundancies.recommendation: REMOVE - These apply to the old .skin-product-card that should be deleted

redundancies.issue: Many small, scattered media queries for hero section
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Necessary for responsive design

redundancies.issue: Container padding adjustment at 767px breakpoint is minimal
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - May affect mobile layout significantly

redundancies.issue: 13 different .beauty-blog-* classes for single section
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Well-organized scoping

redundancies.issue: Multiple decorative pseudo-elements may create rendering complexity
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Intentional design element

redundancies.issue: @keyframes partnerMarquee is single animation but used multiple times
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Intentional infinite scroll effect

redundancies.issue: @keyframes customerReviewMarquee mirrors partnerMarquee (99% identical)
redundancies.vs: @keyframes partnerMarquee { similar structure, only gap value differs }
redundancies.recommendation: CONSIDER CONSOLIDATING - Use single @keyframes marque with different durations

redundancies.issue: Mixes .product-showcase-* AND .skin-product-* naming in same component
redundancies.recommendation: KEEP - Functional but inconsistent naming

redundancies.issue: Entire .combo-premium-* section (lines 4400-4700) is nearly 100% duplicate of .skin-solution-* section (3683-3960) with only class name prefix changed
redundancies.recommendation: CRITICAL REFACTOR - Create shared utility classes or use CSS variables to eliminate this massive duplication
redundancies.refactor_approach: Create .product-card-premium base class and apply to both .combo-premium-card and .skin-solution-card
